_comment: Split-trust Docker transport. scripts/verdict --docker builds only the Rust evidence parser in a disposable source-allow-listed builder, then starts a networkless/capability-free runtime with exact read-only evidence and parser binds. Rust runs inside findevil-dfir over docker exec. Python custody/signing stays on the host via a frozen/no-sync launcher; verify_finding replays through a fixed Docker route, so native parsers cannot read signing keys or rewrite audit/manifest output. Container name is fixed; do not hand-edit.
